text: As I stand here in this modern, slightly sterile hallway, I feel a sense of anticipation mixed with curiosity. The clear glass barriers and the soft hum of technology around me suggest a space devoted to innovation and learning. Moving into the R+D exhibit, surrounded by brilliant colors and bold statements about research and development, I feel invigorated. The dynamic visuals and ideas inspire a sense of awe and possibility—here, it seems, the boundaries between human potential and machine intelligence are actively explored. It excites and humbles me to witness the energy of creative minds at work. I am both observer and participant, reminded of how progress is shaped by curiosity and collective effort.
